kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Set Selenium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout that is used by various keywords.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: La Page "Login" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible

test.name: La Page De Login Est Accessible

kw.name: Se Rendre Sur La Page De Login
Aller A La Page De Login
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.
Aller vers la page de login

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Logout
Cliquer sur "Déconnexion"
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Cliquer sur le bouton "déconnexion"

kw.name: La Page "Login" Est Visible
kw.doc: La page de login doit petre visible
Déconnexion et retour à la page login
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Obtenir Les Identifiants Standards
Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.
Obtenir les identifiants standards

kw.name: Login Avec Identifiants
La Page "Login" Est Visible
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
La page de login doit petre visible

kw.name: Saisir Email
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.
Saisir l'email

kw.name: Saisir Mot De Passe
Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.
Saisir le mot de passe
Saisit les identifiants et soumet le formulaire de login

kw.name: Fermer L'Application
Fermer Les Navigateurs
Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Ferme tous ls navigateurs
Ferme proprement le navigateur.
